note: Piccoma (Kakao Piccoma JP). Row-level rules derived from 202603 (settlement 202604) reverse-engineering. Uses the 取次report + 出版社report pair.

type_rules.note: Novel-series titles (horizontal 話 distribution, novel format)

formulas.before_tax_income_jpy: floor(max(取次.精算対象当月売上[col_type], 取次.最終精算[col_type]) * 1.10)
formulas.after_tax_income_jpy_a: max(取次.精算対象当月売上[col_type], 取次.最終精算[col_type])
formulas.note: col_type is 話 for WT/WR/WN, 巻 for EB/EP. excel_round = floor(x + 0.5) (round half up, not banker's). before_tax_income floor because Excel truncates at the 1-yen boundary.
